deviations.description: The process model includes the activities 'measure blood pressure' and 'measure pulse' as part of determining donor eligibility, but Version 2 of the requirement prohibits these activities. The process directly violates the new prohibition.

The removal of the precondition linking measurement activities to donor eligibility means the prohibition now applies globally, not just during eligibility determination. The process model still includes these activities, resulting in a violation of the new global prohibition.
